instruction: Can you delay VS Code autoSave for 1000 milliseconds?

steps.suggested_step: Click the gear icon at the bottom left corner `{"point": [865, 52]}`.
Click "Settings" in the menu that appears.
Type "autoSaveDelay" in the "Search settings" bar at the top.
Change the value in the "Files: Auto Save Delay" input box to "1000".

steps: Click the gear icon at the bottom left corner `{"point": [865, 52]}`.
